task_description: Create a standalone Pine Script v6 indicator at indicators/rs-dynamic-mtf.pine implementing a 10-layer multi-timeframe Resistance & Support Dynamic system with swing detection, volume validation, ATR zones, overlap prevention, 3-strike mitigation, and alpha decay per layer.

verification.summary: No local Pine Script compiler available. Manual code review confirms all 4 review issues resolved: (1) centerLine field added to ZoneData UDT, drawCenterlines now deletes old line before creating new one; (2) volume expressions offset by swingLen to validate pivot bar volume; (3) touch detection gated behind barstate.isconfirmed; (4) dead var bool alert state variables removed.
